hero.description: I'm {name}. I help businesses transform complex requirements into high-performance {apps}. Specializing in multi-tenant SaaS, real-time dashboards, and enterprise-grade systems.

about.description_1: Hi, I'm {name}. With over {years} of experience, I don't just write code—I architect systems that scale. From multi-tenant insurance platforms to automated payroll ecosystems, I focus on performance, security, and long-term maintainability.
about.description_2: My expertise has helped startups and established enterprises alike, including increasing operational productivity by {percent} at Ordivo and launching cultural preservation platforms like Ensiklotari.

documentation.hero_description: Documenting what I've done so I don't forget and others know what I've accomplished.

footer.description: Crafting digital experiences with clean code and modern aesthetics. Let's build something amazing together.

laukita-theme.description: A sophisticated POS solution featuring a high-fidelity dashboard. This project highlights a clean, data-driven UI with elegant visualization cards and a streamlined sidebar, engineered to transform complex transaction data into a seamless user experience.
laukita-theme.challenges: Building an inventory system that stays responsive while handling thousands of SKUs required extremely tight state management optimization using Pinia and virtual scrolling techniques.

dreams-theme.description: An aesthetically-driven POS theme that prioritizes visual clarity and modern interaction patterns. The interface utilizes a balanced color palette and spacious layout to minimize cognitive load.
dreams-theme.challenges: Balancing high-level animations with hardware limitations on mid-range POS tablets required CSS GPU acceleration optimization.

dashboard-admin-theme.description: A comprehensive administrative powerhouse designed for high-level data oversight. The dashboard integrates complex analytical charts and status indicators into a cohesive layout.
dashboard-admin-theme.challenges: Managing complex multi-tenant data state while maintaining render performance on tables with thousands of rows.

customer-portal-app.description: A mobile-first insurance portal that bridges the gap between complex policy management and user-friendly mobile interfaces.
customer-portal-app.challenges: Offline data synchronization in Flutter to ensure users can still access policy details even in low signal conditions.

api-service-imgbb.description: A developer-centric cloud storage solution that streamlines image management. This TypeScript-based API service provides a robust bridge to IMGBB storage.
api-service-imgbb.challenges: Handling rate limiting from third-party APIs by implementing a smart queue system so no data is lost.

floucloud.description: An innovative cloud services platform where I architected the core Content Management System. This project showcases the power of dynamic content delivery.
floucloud.challenges: Integration between Nuxt 3 frontend and .Net Core backend requiring extremely strict API format standardization.

ticketing-portal-automation.description: An automation system connecting developer workflows on GitHub with internal ticket management systems in real-time.
ticketing-portal-automation.challenges: Building accurate sub-task detection logic based on developer branch activity without disrupting their main workflow.

vue-button.description: A developer-focused UI library simplifying design system implementation. Focused on customizable and accessible Button components.
vue-button.challenges: Ensuring the library remains flexible for various design themes while having the smallest possible footprint.

zoom-oauth-integration.description: A full implementation of the Zoom API Authorization Code Grant flow designed for scalability and user data security.
zoom-oauth-integration.challenges: The biggest challenge was taming strict security policies from Zoom that require very precise Basic Auth encoding.

features.3: Base64 Header Optimization for Enterprise APIs
features.4: Seamless Ngrok Tunneling for Local Webhooks

ensiklotari.description: A digital bridge for cultural preservation, connecting traditional dance artists with a global audience through a rich visual experience.
ensiklotari.challenges: Delivering heavy multimedia content (dance videos) while maintaining page loading speed.

web-builder.description: A high-performance drag-and-drop web builder designed for speed and flexibility. This tool empowers users to create modern layouts effortlessly using a modular component system.
web-builder.challenges: Implementing a robust drag-and-drop mechanism with nested components while maintaining optimal performance and state synchronization across the application.

attendance-saas.description: A comprehensive multi-tenant SaaS application for real-time attendance management, timesheet tracking, and automated payroll processing.
attendance-saas.challenges: Implementing a scalable multi-tenant architecture with real-time data synchronization while ensuring data isolation and security for each tenant.

cms-hays-gallery.description: A specialized Content Management System (CMS) built for a gallery environment, focusing on efficient asset management and presentation.
cms-hays-gallery.challenges: Developing a flexible system that allows for easy reorganization of gallery items without compromising page performance.

maida-clinic.description: A high-performance landing page for Maida Clinic, optimized for search engines and user experience to drive patient engagement.
maida-clinic.challenges: Ensuring high scores in Web Vitals while maintaining a rich, visually appealing medical interface.

pm-tricks-lms.description: A custom Learning Management System (LMS) designed for project management training, featuring interactive progress tracking.
pm-tricks-lms.challenges: Implementing a complex progress-saving mechanism that persists across various types of learning content.

store-vue-catalog.description: An elegant e-commerce catalog built with Nuxt.js, prioritizing speed and SEO for a seamless shopping experience.
store-vue-catalog.challenges: Synchronizing large product datasets with the frontend while maintaining a near-instantaneous search experience.

dikti-company.description: A professional company profile application for DIKTI, showcasing institutional achievements and information.
dikti-company.challenges: Designing a clean, authoritative interface that adheres to government accessibility standards.

uniqlo-slicing.description: A high-precision UI slicing project based on the Uniqlo design language, demonstrating expert-level CSS layout skills.
uniqlo-slicing.challenges: Achieving perfect visual fidelity across all screen sizes using only custom CSS and semantic HTML.

next-movie-app.description: A dynamic movie exploration application leveraging the TMDB API to provide real-time ratings, reviews, and discovery.
next-movie-app.challenges: Managing asynchronous API calls and large media assets to ensure a smooth scrolling and discovery experience.

bujangga-manik-app.description: An appointment booking and company profile platform for the construction sector, streamlining client-provider communication.
bujangga-manik-app.challenges: Designing a transparent and easy-to-use communication bridge between construction professionals and potential clients.

slc-lms.description: A comprehensive Learning Management System for Smile Learning Center, managing educational resources and student records.
slc-lms.challenges: Building a secure and scalable backend to handle concurrent student access and large educational files.

tic-tac-toe.description: A clean and interactive Tic Tac Toe game built with React, focusing on state management and game logic implementation.
tic-tac-toe.challenges: Implementing an efficient win-detection algorithm while maintaining a responsive UI.

book-library-api.description: A robust RESTful API for a book library system, built with Golang for high performance and reliability.
book-library-api.challenges: Designing an optimized database schema to handle complex relationships between books, authors, and categories.

skills_content.react: Expert-level proficiency in building scalable React applications using modern patterns like Hooks, Context API, and Server-Side Rendering.
skills_content.vue: Deep expertise in the Vue.js ecosystem, including Nuxt 3, Pinia, and Vue Router.
skills_content.node: Node.js is a cross-platform, open-source JavaScript runtime environment.
skills_content.express: Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js.
skills_content.golang: An open-source programming language supported by Google.
skills_content.tailwind: A utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building custom designs.
skills_content.bootstrap: A popular CSS framework for developing responsive websites.
skills_content.sass: A CSS preprocessor for efficient styling.
skills_content.js: A versatile, high-level programming language for the web.
skills_content.ts: A strongly typed programming language built on JavaScript.
skills_content.ci: A lightweight yet powerful PHP framework.
skills_content.mongodb: A scalable and flexible document-based NoSQL database.
skills_content.vercel: A cloud platform for ultra-fast deployment.

shared_project_desc.web_builder: A high-performance drag-and-drop web builder built with React.
shared_project_desc.nextjs_movie: List Movie And Rating built with Next.js.
shared_project_desc.tic_tac_toe: A simple Tic Tac Toe game with React.
shared_project_desc.ensiklotari: A cultural platform built with Vue 3.
shared_project_desc.bujanggamanik: Appointment app for the construction sector.
shared_project_desc.web_absen: Internal HR system for Public Works.
shared_project_desc.store_vue: E-commerce UI theme built with Nuxt.js.
shared_project_desc.book_api: Simple RESTful API for book library.

projects.hero_description: A collection of selected works showcasing my dedication.

contact.title: Let's build something visionary.
contact.description: I'm available for freelance and full-time roles.
contact.form_description: Got a technical issue? Let me know.

cta.description_1: I'm available for freelance and full-time roles.
